Non-negative number of milliseconds to throttle the update rate from 0ms to 5000ms. Set to 0 for sending updates immediately.

Non-negative maximum number of entries to return.

Added as a part of security scheme: basic

Basic Price Alerting deals with generation of alerts based on current
price data. Users can define an upper or lower limit and choose on which
price type those limit conditions apply.
